name: Steve LaSpina
abstract: Steven Frank LaSpina (born March 24, 1954) is an American jazz bassist who plays both upright and electric bass.

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Here’s one with a Canadian band, with Don Thompson and Claude Ranger, plus Steve LaSpina on bass. [INTERVIEWEE] The legendary Claude Ranger... That’s Vic’s date.
